message:
fix(fcp-telemetry): enforce lowercase hex in trace_id and span_id serde deserialization

Add is_lowercase_hex validation to the hex_16 and hex_8 serde modules
so that trace_id and span_id reject uppercase hex during deserialization,
matching the W3C Trace Context lowercase requirement.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
